message:
test(credential_broker): variant-dispatch Display coverage for 4 enums (22 paths)

- CredentialSensitivity: Medium + High (only Low + Critical were tested)
- CredentialKind: 4 untested variants (OAuth2Client, SshKey,
  SymmetricKey, GenericSecret) — only 3/7 were tested
- CredentialAuditType: 7 untested variants (CredentialRegistered,
  LeaseExpired, LeaseRevoked, CredentialRevoked, CredentialExpired,
  ProviderRegistered, ProviderStatusChanged) — only 3/10 were tested
- CredentialBrokerError: all 9 variants (zero Display tests existed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
